context.raw_input:
58yo F, MICU day 1 admission for urosepsis. Temp 38.6, HR 102, BP 94/62 on norepinephrine
0.08 mcg/kg/min, RR 20, SpO2 98% on 4L NC. A&Ox3, GCS 15. Equal and reactive pupils.
Lungs CTA bilaterally. RRR, no murmurs. Abdomen soft. UO 28 mL/hr via foley.
No skin breakdown. PIV x2 RFA. Vancomycin + pip-tazo infusing. Lactic acid 3.2 trending down.
